cards.back: A situation where two or more threads are blocked indefinitely, each waiting for the other to release a resource
A situation where two or more threads are unable to make progress, each doing the same action over and over again
A situation where one or more threads are unable to access a shared resource due to other threads holding onto it for an extended period
A situation where a lower-priority thread is able to outperform a higher-priority thread due to the lower-priority thread's lack of access to system resources
A situation where the outcome of a program depends on the relative timing of two or more threads accessing shared data
